description: npm analog of frameworks/_index/spm-deps.json. Maps the web-components-3d framework to the three.js core, addon families, and rapier3d-compat that must be VENDORED LOCALLY into resources/three/ and resources/rapier/. These are NOT installed from a registry at runtime and are NEVER loaded from a CDN. The exact versions below are the single source of truth for which build to vendor. Each game's local importmap maps the bare specifier 'three' and the prefix 'three/addons/' to the vendored copies; rapier3d-compat is the embedded-wasm (base64) build so it is offline-safe under file://.

vendoringRules.noCDN: Never reference unpkg, jsdelivr, esm.sh, or any https:// import. All bytes ship inside the artifact bundle.
vendoringRules.rendererPath: WebGL2 WebGLRenderer only. Do not vendor or reference the WebGPU build.
vendoringRules.copyOnAssemble: At install time the assembler copies the needed files into the artifact's own resources/three/ and resources/rapier/ so every Hub bundle is fully self-contained.
vendoringRules.binaryStep: The actual binary files (resources/three/*, resources/rapier/*) are a separate large-file step pending user confirmation and are NOT authored as Lego source.

packages.name: three
packages.note: Core three.js r160. Vendored as a single ES module. The local importmap maps the bare specifier 'three' to this file.

packages.name: three/addons/controls
packages.note: Camera/control addons. Vendored from the three r160 examples/jsm/controls tree.

packages.name: three/addons/loaders
packages.note: Asset loaders. Vendored from three r160 examples/jsm/loaders. GLTF for low-poly models, RGBE for HDR environment fallback (optional).

packages.name: three/addons/postprocessing
packages.note: Postprocessing family. Vendor the FULL transitive subtree as a unit. UnrealBloomPass also pulls the shaders below.

packages.name: three/addons/shaders
packages.note: Shader chunks required by the postprocessing passes (CopyShader for ShaderPass/OutputPass, LuminosityHighPassShader for UnrealBloomPass).

packages.name: @dimforge/rapier3d-compat
packages.note: Rapier 3D physics, compat (embedded-wasm, base64 wasm in JS) build so it runs under file:// with no separate .wasm fetch. ONLY pulled by physics recipes via systems.rapier-physics-world; most 3D games hand-roll motion and do not include this.

web-components-3d.bundleSizeImpact: 0.7 to 1.0 MB per artifact (three core minified) plus ~1.9 MB if rapier is included

_seedingPlan: Seeded with the three.js r160 core, four addon families (controls, loaders, postprocessing with full transitive subtree, shaders), and rapier3d-compat. Extend members as new Lego modules import additional addon files. Bump the version block when re-vendoring a newer three.js release; re-copy resources/three/* in the same pass.
